title: Implement natural and cultural resource management plans
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement natural and cultural resource management plans demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine priorities in management plan

pcs.text: Identify priorities in natural and/or cultural resource management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify priorities in natural and/or cultural resource management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify priorities in natural and/or cultural resource management plan.

pcs.text: Refine priorities in plan into development or maintenance projects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refine priorities in plan into development or maintenance projects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refine priorities in plan into development or maintenance projects.

pcs.text: Develop procedures to address conservation priorities according to legislation, codes of practice and workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop procedures to address conservation priorities according to legislation, codes of practice and workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop procedures to address conservation priorities according to legislation, codes of practice and workplace health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine priorities in management plan

elements.title: Develop projects to priorities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine development and maintenance projects according to legislation, current charters and standards, and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify outcomes and key project actions.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resource and funding requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resource and funding requirements.
